chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Custom Reference Application No.72 of 2019 Special Custom Reference Application No.73 of 2019 Special Custom Reference Application No.74 of 2019 The Collector of Customs Vs. Haji Abdul Raziq Khan & Brothers DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection Nos.6 & 22. 2. For orders on CMA No.627/2019 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of Main Case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.628/2019 (Stay). 12.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for applicants..-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, learned counsel for the applicants has filed a statement along with covering letter for not pressing these References. The statement along with annexure is taken on record and in view of such statement and the annexure attached therewith the above Reference Applications are dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Office is directed to place copy of this order in above connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
